name: Prof. Yen-Wen Lu
bio: Professor Lu leads interdisciplinary research in microfluidics, biomedical microsystems, intelligent healthcare, soft robotics, and thermal-fluid engineering.
bioZh: 盧教授帶領微流體、生醫微系統、智慧醫療、軟性機器人與熱流工程等跨領域研究。

name: Postdoctoral Fellows & Researchers
bio: Researchers contribute independent execution, system integration, mentoring, and international collaboration.
bioZh: 研究人員負責獨立執行、系統整合、協助指導與國際合作。

name: Graduate Students
bio: Graduate students are trained to become creative, independent, responsible, and internationally minded researchers who can turn ideas into real-world impact.
bioZh: 研究生的培育目標，是成為具創意、獨立性、責任感與國際視野，並能將想法轉化為真實影響的研究者。

name: Alumni Network
bio: Alumni continue their careers in technology companies, research institutes, hospitals, startups, and universities.
bioZh: 校友持續於科技企業、研究機構、醫療體系、新創與大學發展。
